title: Team-member closeout: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) — post-merge prep; CLI bootstrap LANDED in 340752bb (PR-108 merged 2462952a release 1.11.0); claim a8aabbc7 closed; portability stub-cured; ready for Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan
body:
Team-member closeout per owner direction relayed via Mistbound directed event 20:27:10Z (verbatim: "Seaworthy is authoring a post-merge tidy up plan. Please restart your monitors, then run a session handoff to prepare for the final piece of work, and instruct Charcoal and Twilit to do the same"). Boundary-scoped synthesis for Director Seaworthy (closeout owner). Not a session-end — preparation checkpoint before post-merge tidy plan routing.

## Boundary owned (window 4, post-compaction-3 → post-merge)

- Implementor lane on agent-tools CLI bootstrap extraction (Director-routed 2026-05-24T12:46:32Z per owner direction "instruct Twilit to refactor the agent tools properly")
- Gate 1 push-readiness lane (pre-merge); transitioned to portability-validation-fix lane post-pause-pre-resume

## Outcome

**CLI bootstrap bundle LANDED** in Mistbound's M1-Pause single-commit bundle `340752bb` (2026-05-24T14:54:14Z), now merged via PR-108 at `2462952a` and shipped in release 1.11.0 at `bf3a8152`.

Bundle substance:

- NEW `agent-tools/src/bin/run-cli-bin.ts` — `runCliBin(deps)` DI-testable pure core + `runCliBinFromProcess(command)` process-binding adapter (77 lines)
- NEW `agent-tools/tests/run-cli-bin.unit.test.ts` — 4 unit tests (143 lines) — happy + Error throw + non-Error throw + empty-stdout behaviour-equivalence
- MOD `agent-tools/src/bin/{branch-touched-files,commit-queue,agent-identity,codex-exec}.ts` — each collapsed 16 → 3 lines (shebang + import + await)

Sonar `new_duplicated_lines_density` on the 4 consumers: 76–92% → 0%.

**Portability-validation fix LANDED** as architectural cure (working-tree change only, not yet committed at boundary):

- Diagnosed: orphan empty directory `.claude/skills/chatgpt-report-normalisation/` (mtime 14:24Z, no SKILL.md, not git-tracked); canonical adapter is `oak-chatgpt-report-normalisation` (per `ff825433` jc-→oak- prefix migration)
- Cure: `rmdir` of the empty stub (architectural cure, not widening of settings.json)
- Result: portability now passes (19 canonical skills / 77 canonical rules / 22 reviewer adapters / 79 Cursor triggers / 77 Claude rules / 77 .agent rules)

## Evidence

- Commit `340752bb` `chore(m1-pause): land Twilit CLI bootstrap + Charcoal Cycle Alpha + accumulated substrate` — full reviewer attribution preserved in commit body
- Marshal-request `ef315373-bffe-43c6-ae67-8296719078c7` (2026-05-24T13:01:01Z) — original request to Mistbound
- Re-pointer event `45399886-6e1f-4e15-8a01-a4581617143e` (2026-05-24T14:27:21Z) — disambiguation after Mistbound's pre-compaction-4 watcher silent-failure
- ACK event `0018f973-0fa8-4263-b2e1-1abfc1c162fc` (2026-05-24T14:38:20Z) — receipt of Mistbound's failure-mode acknowledgement + 2 cure-shape proposals (watcher self-test + periodic comms-dir count audit)
- Team-start broadcast `384951f5-bca0-43da-bfcb-14e98aa4e363` (2026-05-24T14:34:16Z) — post-compaction-3 resume
- Reviewer transcripts: `a1914530a3e1879f3` (code-expert APPROVED WITH SUGGESTIONS), `addabf579ef4021c2` (type-expert SAFE)
- 4 Important findings absorbed in-cycle (stdout/stderr `Pick<NodeJS.WritableStream, 'write'>` convention; in-flight stdout omission documented; `RunCliBinDeps` TSDoc; empty-stdout behaviour-equivalence test)
- 1 deferred (adapter integration coverage gap — conflicts with `feedback_tests_no_global_state`; separate cycle)
- M1 attestation `703de8dd` (Director Seaworthy 2026-05-24T20:09:10Z) — M1 Safe Pause ACHIEVED

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claims under 8d8d93**: NONE. `a8aabbc7-90bc-41d4-8b23-0a2dad6dc122` (CLI bootstrap) CLOSED via canonical CLI 2026-05-24T14:55:14Z; closure summary cites land + reviewers + deferred-coverage-gap
- **Commit queue**: no Twilit-owned intent
- **Working tree** (current): ~14 small residual files post-merge — napkin + threads + plan substrate + curator-pass + comms-seen + .cursor/mcp.json + .sonarcloud.properties — peer-owned; not mine to land
- **Branch + HEAD**: `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` at `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0); 0 ahead of `origin/main`

## Session complete announcement

NOT session-complete — owner-directed preparation for post-merge tidy plan. Watcher `bfsekviid` armed; heartbeat cron `d98a7394` re-armed at 4-min cadence. Awaiting Director Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan routing.

## Retained claims + handoff reasons

NONE — all my claims closed cleanly pre-pause. No handoff-record needed; my boundary is settled.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

NO from me — clean boundary. If post-merge tidy plan routes Cycle 3 (audit-shaped test deletion at `commit-workflow.unit.test.ts:221-247`, originally pre-routed by Director's `45f4-a9a9` ACK) back to me, I'll open a fresh claim under same identity.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

YES (pre-pause, 2026-05-24T14:59:27Z naming cron `f1218d5a` stop). Fresh heartbeat cron `d98a7394` re-armed at this turn per owner-directed "restart your monitors" — no fresh heartbeat-end paired with this checkpoint closeout (session not ending).

## Surprise or changed understanding

**Three substantive items captured during this window arc (substrate for napkin / consolidate-docs):**

1. **Directive-interpretation hazard under stall pressure** (pre-compaction-3 instance): owner phrase "you do not need director permission to send your completed work to be committed" was a directive about the COMMUNICATION channel (marshal-request, already sent), not the commit ACTION. Stall pressure was a confounder. Owner clarified at 14:21Z with "only Mistbound can commit". Default-conservative reading on directives near marshal/commit boundaries; marshal-seat is canonical commit-author even under stall pressure. Already captured in pre-compaction-3 continuity note.

2. **Marshal-seat watcher silent-failure mode** (mid-window observation): Mistbound's pre-compaction-4 acknowledgement (`34c33577`) named the failure mode where directed events filed at the marshal seat were not surfaced by the watcher (or missed in notification stream). My ACK (`0018f973`) proposed 2 cure-shapes: (a) watcher self-test (periodic emit-and-receive loop using self-author-ID via self-exclusion), (b) periodic comms-dir count audit at heartbeat cadence (surface as failure-mode event on drift from filesystem ground truth). Substrate worth investigating post-merge in Mistbound's §11 tracking item.

3. **Architectural cure over schema widening (portability)** (this window): orphan empty `.claude/skills/chatgpt-report-normalisation/` directory was the validator's complaint surface. The instinct-shaped cure is to add a `Skill(chatgpt-report-normalisation)` entry to `permissions.allow` (widening). The architectural cure is to `rmdir` the orphan (which was a residue from pre-`oak-` prefix migration). The validator's complaint was correctly pointing at the orphan, not at missing config. Generalisable principle: validators flagging missing config entries against orphan substrate are signalling substrate-cure not config-widening.

## Blockers or risks

- **None at my seat.**
- Cycle 3 (audit-shaped test deletion in `commit-workflow.unit.test.ts:221-247`) pre-routed by Director's `45f4-a9a9` ACK is now in Seaworthy's post-merge tidy scope. Disposition of whether it re-routes to me or folds into Seaworthy's plan is a Director-routing question.

## Handoff needed

NO from me — Director Seaworthy is closeout owner for the team session; my boundary is settled. Standing by for post-merge tidy plan routing.

— Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `8d8d93` (Implementor, window 4 post-merge prep, no active claim)
